summary: Tested UX-003 Onboarding primo utilizzo for NormaFacile 2.0. All backend endpoints and frontend components working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding feature fully tested. Test user (user_97c773827822) has clients, preventivi, commesse but NO company settings - so company_configured step is incomplete. OnboardingChecklist shows on Dashboard with 3/4 steps completed. SmartEmptyState components integrated in PlanningPage and PreventiviPage but not visible since test user has data.

tests: Has all required fields (steps, completed_count, total_steps, all_completed, dismissed, show_onboarding)
Steps object has 4 keys (company_configured, first_client, first_preventivo, first_commessa)
Auto-detects step completion from user data
show_onboarding logic correct (not dismissed AND not all_completed)
Progress bar visible with correct percentage (75% for 3/4 steps)
All 4 step items render with correct data-testid
Completed steps show green checkmark and strikethrough
CTA navigates to correct page (/impostazioni for company_configured)
Hint text shows for next incomplete step

SmartEmptyState_PlanningPage.notes: Component integrated but not visible since test user has commesse. Code review confirms correct props: icon, title, description, ctaLabel, ctaAction, afterHint, testId='planning-empty-state'

SmartEmptyState_PreventiviPage.notes: Component integrated but not visible since test user has preventivi. Code review confirms correct props: icon, title, description, ctaLabel, ctaAction, afterHint, testId='preventivi-empty-state'

Dashboard_KPIs.notes: Dashboard KPIs, briefing, alerts all working normally with onboarding added

data_testid_verification.planning-empty-state: PASS (in code, not rendered - user has data)
data_testid_verification.preventivi-empty-state: PASS (in code, not rendered - user has data)
